prompt: I'm building a real-time collaborative editor (think Google Docs clone) and I need to decide on the persistence layer. We're looking at PostgreSQL with LISTEN/NOTIFY, or CockroachDB for horizontal scaling, or maybe just going all-in on Redis with AOF persistence. The team is 4 backend engineers, all comfortable with SQL. What should we pick?

assertions.name: suggests-council-or-multiple-perspectives
assertions.description: The response should suggest consulting the council or note that this is a decision that benefits from diverse perspectives

assertions.name: acknowledges-tradeoffs
assertions.description: The response acknowledges that each option has genuine tradeoffs rather than giving a single definitive answer

assertions.name: references-specific-constraints
assertions.description: The response references the user's specific constraints (team size, SQL familiarity, real-time requirement)
